title: Warts

red_flags.text: Supports persistence, bleeding, rapid change, pain, infection concern, and immunocompromise as documentation prompts without an automatic management conclusion.
red_flags.rationale: Supports persistence, bleeding, rapid change, pain, infection concern, and immunocompromise prompts without management advice.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports persistence, bleeding, rapid change, pain, infection concern, and immunocompromise as documentation prompts without an automatic management conclusion.

exact_section.heading: Persistence, complications, and when assessment matters

treatment_and_management.text: Supports verruca or wart identity, rough surface, black dots or thrombosed capillaries, location, count, spread, and pain.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports plantar wart or verruca identity, surface, black dots, count, location, spread, and pain.

source_limitations: The source is plantar-specific and has an overdue review date.
Non-plantar wart sites, dermoscopy, infection, general skin care, observation, treatment discussion, fixed follow-up, medicine, and procedures remain unsupported.
Qualified UAE clinician review is required.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
